operations.criticalAlertThreshold: MFA push-channel delivery failure > 5% in 5 min OR factor-not-enrolled count grows > 10% week-over-week.
dailyChangePoints: Onboarding new identity providers (SAML/OIDC application registration)
Promoting FIDO2 / push factors for new groups

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Primary↔DR Vault replication error in ITA.log OR > 3 PSM session failures in 15 min.
dailyChangePoints: Creating Safe partitions and mapping AD group permissions
Onboarding new privileged target hosts (Windows / Linux / DB)
Defining password rotation windows + CPM policy assignments
Reviewing and approving JIT checkout extensions

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Site moved from block → monitor without a CR ticket OR DAST scan failure on a Critical-tier site.
dailyChangePoints: Onboarding new FQDNs to WAAP policy
Tuning SQLi / XSS exception lists for web banking flows
Scheduling weekly DAST scans + reviewing findings

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Cluster replication lag > 30s OR > 1% policy compilation error rate OR gateway disconnected.
dailyChangePoints: Managing SSL / TLS cert deployments per virtual site
Tuning false-positive blocks (SQLi / XSS exception tuning)
Staging policy bundles ahead of app releases
Onboarding new virtual sites to the WAAP cluster

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Communication-breakdown alert from a manager node OR > 5% of agents on a policy version > 7 days old.
dailyChangePoints: Adjusting local IPS rules on legacy operating systems
Updating server policy matrices for new asset groups

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: SFTP listener down OR outbound transfer pipeline blocked OR partner cert expiring < 7 days.
dailyChangePoints: Configuring folder access controls and triggers

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Subnet pool allocation > 85% OR zone-transfer failure on a master OR anycast resolver fails healthcheck.
dailyChangePoints: Building DNS A / CNAME / TXT zone mappings
Setting DHCP scope parameters for new branches

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: AMCore signature definitions > 24 h out of date on any active endpoint OR recovery key missing on > 0.1% of fleet.
dailyChangePoints: Managing ePO repository update source mirrors

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Outbound pipeline transfer blockage errors OR classifier deploy failure rate > 1% OR endpoint client_uninstalled > 0.5% week-over-week.
Endpoint offline > 48 h on servers OR tamper-protection-triggered count > 5 in 1 h OR RFM endpoints > 0.1% of fleet.
dailyChangePoints: Deploying agent upgrades across server pools
Adding hash / pathway exclusions for app false positives

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Database VM enters Agent Disconnected state OR > 10 assets in policy_diverged status in last 24h.
dailyChangePoints: Assigning Environment / Role / Application labels to new VMs
Reconciling drift between intent and effective policy

telemetryEndpoints.label: Switch-ACL write error
telemetryEndpoints.value: syslog: msg=Plugin Engine Error: Failed to write switch ACL

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Switch-port write access validation failure OR appliance system load > 85% sustained 10 min.
dailyChangePoints: Onboarding edge access switches via SNMP credentials

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: CPU > 90% sustained 5 min OR VPN tunnel state down OR HA failover (logid 0100022001).
dailyChangePoints: Configuring Virtual IPs (VIPs) for local NAT
Upgrading FortiOS firmware on rolling pairs

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: BFD flap count > 5 in 15 min on a single overlay OR SLA breach > 30 min on prod overlay.
dailyChangePoints: Tuning SLA targets per overlay class
Rolling out new performance SLA classes
Reviewing overlay health on hub-and-spoke topology

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Policy install to a managed gateway fails OR ADOM sync error count > 0 in last hour.
dailyChangePoints: Publishing policy revisions to managed FortiGates

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Disk > 85% OR retention floor reduced below compliance minimum (RBI = 180d) OR syslog drop spike > 1k/min.
dailyChangePoints: Tuning storage tiers between analytics + archive

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: API connection timeout to Prisma Access OR HA state change on physical edge OR > 1 SASE node tunnel unhealthy.
dailyChangePoints: Onboarding remote users to SASE gateways
Creating edge security policy access rules

telemetryEndpoints.label: Node DOWN log
telemetryEndpoints.value: syslog: msg=Local/mcpd Error: Node state changed to DOWN

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Pool member down inside a Core App OR SSL chip > 80% sustained 10 min OR mcpd node DOWN log.
dailyChangePoints: Onboarding new app farms into pools

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Mitigation engine packet-drop anomalies (> 3σ) OR hardware-bypass self-test failure.
dailyChangePoints: Tuning mitigation rules ahead of high-traffic windows

telemetryEndpoints.label: cpd / fwd crash
telemetryEndpoints.value: syslog: msg=Process cpd terminated OR Process fwd terminated

operations.criticalAlertThreshold: Daemon processes (cpd / fwd) missing from process table OR sandbox processing queue > 80%.
dailyChangePoints: Publishing and installing access-control policies to distributed gateways
